seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalize the input from a single-resource bin-capacity assignment to a full generalized assignment problem where both the value v[i][j] and the resource draw w[i][j] depend on the (act, platform) pair, and tighten the output so each act runs on at most one platform under per-platform generator budgets; the optimal schedule is NP-hard and first-fit / value-density / regret+local-search strategies diverge.
title: Starlight Carnival: Ride-Circuit Act Scheduling
strategies: first-fit baseline: place each act in input order on the lowest-indexed platform with room (value-blind)
value-density greedy: sort all (act,platform) pairs by thrill-per-kilowatt and assign each act to its first affordable pair
regret-based construction: repeatedly assign the act whose best-vs-second-best placement gap is largest to its best platform
local search: relocate and swap acts across platforms (and in/out of the show) from a regret start, with deterministic randomized restarts
